titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Memorial Quadrangle, Yale University, Photographs by James S. Hedden
Memorial Quadrangle, Yale University, Photographs by James S. Hedden
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.
This collection contains 11 published digital objects. And those objects are comprised of 14 digital files.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday January 13, 2024 at 08:35

did.unittitle: Memorial Quadrangle, Yale University, photographs by James S. Hedden
did.abstract: The materials consist of photographs by James S. Hedden documenting the excavation and construction of Memorial Quadrangle at Yale. Other views include photographs of completed decorations and interiors, models, the installation of millstones and bells, assignment plans, and the construction of the fan vault ceiling in the Memorial Room of Harkness Tower.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 46-B (YRG 46-B), Records and materials documenting individual Yale buildings, facilities, and grounds.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Memorial Quadrangle, Yale University, Photographs by James S. Hedden (RU 631). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by topic.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The materials consist of photographs by James S. Hedden documenting the excavation and construction of Memorial Quadrangle at Yale. Other views include photographs of completed decorations and interiors, models, the installation of millstones and bells, assignment plans, and the construction of the fan vault ceiling in the Memorial Room of Harkness Tower.

did.unittitle: Assignment plans, lists of memorials, etc.

dao.linktitle: Installation of 6-ton bell in Harkness Tower Carillon.
Installation of 6-ton bell in Harkness Tower Carillon.
Moving the millstones for the courtyards.
Moving the millstones for the courtyards.

did.unittitle: Form work in the Fan Vault ceiling

dao.linktitle: Fan vault ceiling in Harkness Tower during construction.

descriptivenote.p: Form work in the Fan Vault ceiling

did.unittitle: Re: Trinity College, University of Toronto
